channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Karl Stefanovic's career and the controversies surrounding Nine's breakfast TV icon
item.description: The article delves into the career of Karl Stefanovic, a prominent figure on Australia's breakfast television scene. It explores his rise to fame, the controversies that have surrounded his career, an...

item.title: TPLF Leader Accuses Federal Government of Troop Redeployment in Tigray
item.description: Fetlework Gebregziabher, a prominent figure in the Tigray People’s Liberation Front (TPLF), has emerged as a vocal critic of the Ethiopian federal government’s military actions in the Tigray region. A...

item.title: UK Heatwave Expands North and West as Temperatures Rise
item.description: The UK is experiencing its third heatwave of the year, with temperatures expected to reach 35°C (95°F) as the weather pattern spreads further north and west. This prolonged period of high temperatures...

item.title: Trump and Zelensky Discuss Ukraine Conflict Amid Tensions with Russia
item.description: The article highlights a tense exchange between U.S. President Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky during a NATO summit in Ankara. Trump, known for his controversial remarks, initi...

item.title: Reasons Behind the Surge in Tree Falls in Mumbai
item.description: The article explores the growing issue of tree falls in Mumbai, linking it to urbanization challenges. Key factors include concretization, which replaces soil with construction materials, weakening ro...

item.title: Nyeri Family Demands Justice After Son Dies in School Bus Accident
item.description: A two-year-old boy, Carlos Brown, died after being allegedly struck by a school bus at Shalom Schools in Nyeri County shortly after arriving at school. His parents claim the school's account of the in...

item.title: Wiseman Zitha's Transition to Hairdressing: A New Chapter in His Career
item.description: Actor, model, and content creator Wiseman Zitha, known for roles in 'Giyani: Land of Blood,' 'Queen Modjadji,' and 'Muvhango,' has transitioned from acting to hairdressing. At 31, he launched his salo...

item.title: Visayas Grid Faces Red Alert Amid Ongoing Power Plant Outages
item.description: The Visayas region is under a red alert due to persistent power plant outages, according to the National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP). The alert, effective from 5 PM to 7 PM, follows pre...

item.title: US-Iran tensions drive oil prices up amid regional conflict
item.description: Oil prices surged over 1% on Thursday as fresh U.S. strikes on Iran intensified, raising fears of prolonged conflict and disrupting global energy flows. Brent crude rose to $78.88 per barrel, while WT...

item.title: Canadian Government to Decommission Gun Gifted to PM Mark Carney by Turkey's President
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has confirmed that the engraved pistol gifted to him by Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan during the NATO summit in Ankara will not be kept or brought back to Canada. T...

item.title: Pakistan and Russia Expand Counterterrorism Cooperation Amid Regional Security Concerns
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi held a high-level meeting with United Nations Secretary General Antonio Guterres, where they discussed regional security dynamics and Pakistan's role in promoting peace....

item.title: Metropolitan Police review referral over £37,500 donation linked to Robert Jenrick's 2024 Conservative leadership campaign
item.description: The Metropolitan Police are reviewing a referral from the Electoral Commission concerning a £37,500 donation made during Robert Jenrick's 2024 campaign for the Conservative Party leadership. The inqui...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs launch culturally inspired kits for upcoming season
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs, in collaboration with jersey sponsors Kappa, have unveiled their new home and away jerseys for the upcoming season. The kits, set to be available from July 24, retail at R1,399 and feat...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial and Alleged Threats Under Scrutiny
item.description: The article delves into the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, focusing on her alleged admission of instructing a hitman to target political rivals. It highlights the legal proceedings,...

item.title: Madikeri Landslide Leads to Temporary Closure of Raja’s Seat for Public Safety
item.description: A landslip near the KSRTC bus stand in Madikeri has prompted authorities to divert all vehicles exiting from private and KSRTC bus stands through Raja’s seat road. This measure aims to manage traffic ...

item.title: Pakistan and Croatia explore port collaboration and bilateral ties
item.description: Pakistan and Croatia have discussed potential collaboration between their ports during a high-level meeting between Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar and Croatia's Foreign Minister Gordan Grlić Radman. ...

item.title: Federal Judge Orders Donald Trump to Pay E. Jean Carroll $5 Million in Sexual Abuse Lawsuit
item.description: A federal judge has ordered the release of $5 million to E. Jean Carroll in her sexual abuse lawsuit against Donald Trump, rejecting his request to delay the payout while he appeals to the Supreme Cou...

item.title: Canan Moodie on Springboks' preparation for Scotland match and milestone
item.description: Canan Moodie, the Springboks' 23-year-old wing, has emphasized the importance of preparation and confidence in the team's readiness for their Nations Championship clash against Scotland. Despite 10 ch...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts First African Pollination Summit to Protect Bees and Butterflies
item.description: Tanzania is set to host the first-ever African Pollination Summit in September 2026, focusing on protecting pollinators like bees and butterflies. Organized by Sustainable Agricultural and Agribusines...

item.title: FIFA's political entanglements and corruption scandals under scrutiny
item.description: The article explores the deepening controversies surrounding FIFA, the international football governing body, highlighting its entanglements with political figures like former U.S. President Donald Tr...
